demographics.living_situation: resident in a residential aged-care facility (nursing home); mobility-impaired, uses a walker

contact_nok.relationship: facility nursing staff (present at the consult)

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My legs have these large water blisters on them that popped up today, and the nurses are worried it's a severe infection.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The blisters came up suddenly today and the facility nurses want a doctor to check whether it is a dangerous skin infection.

symptom_narrative.duration: roughly half a day and still there
symptom_narrative.character: started as small red patches on both lower legs that quickly turned into large, taut, fluid-filled blisters
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the skin feels a bit tight but it is not really painful and it does not itch much
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: both lower legs, mostly the shins
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: came on over the course of the day
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: no fever, no chills, feels generally well in herself, no spreading heat that she has noticed
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: the tightness makes walking with her frame a little less comfortable but she is still mobile

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: gets around with a walker, a bit frail

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: the usual facility medications on her chart

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives in a residential aged-care facility; nursing staff present and helping with the call; padded bedrails in place to prevent skin trauma

objective_data_offered.timing: at the time of the call
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: measured by facility nursing staff with a facility thermometer; single reading

objective_data_offered.value: a few scattered large tense blisters on both lower legs filled with clear fluid; the skin around them looks mildly pink but not angry-red; the blisters look intact
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: appearance over a video/photo; depth and warmth cannot be judged remotely

objective_data_offered.value: nursing staff say she is alert, comfortable at rest and not looking unwell; the blister fluid is clear, not cloudy or yellow
